name: firefox-extension
description: Hutch — Firefox browser extension for saving URLs to a reading list

scripts.compile: node scripts/build-extension.js && web-ext build --source-dir dist-extension --artifacts-dir dist-artifacts --overwrite-dest --filename hutch.xpi
scripts.compile-dev: node scripts/build-extension.js --dev && web-ext build --source-dir dist-extension --artifacts-dir dist-artifacts --overwrite-dest --filename hutch.xpi
scripts.test-with-coverage: tsc && c8 node scripts/run-tests-with-coverage.js && node enforce-coverage.config.js
scripts.check: pnpm compile && pnpm lint && pnpm test-with-coverage && pnpm check-infra
